name: Tesstats
subtitle: Read-only Tesla stats from your own TeslaMate.

apps.name: Tesstats
apps.subtitle: Read-only Tesla stats from your TeslaMate.
apps.localizedDescription:
Tesstats is a beautiful, read-only stats app for your Tesla, powered by your own self-hosted TeslaMate server.

• Live dashboard: battery, range, charging, climate, security, tire pressure, location.
• Trips with maps and consumption.
• Charging sessions with real charge curves (kW vs %SoC).
• Battery health and degradation over time.
• Rich statistics: trends, records, cost, CO2 saved, phantom drain, heatmap.
• Home Screen & Lock Screen widgets, a charging Live Activity, and Siri shortcuts.
• Notifications, multi-car, offline cache, encrypted backups, CSV/JSON/GPX export.

Tesstats is strictly read-only — it never sends any command to your car. It talks only to your own server (MQTT + TeslaMateApi), with everything encrypted by default.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Connects to your self-hosted TeslaMate server on your local network.
